summary: Replaced long Dutch spec descriptions on the 4 Locatieserver MCP tools (free_free, lookup_lookup, reverse_geocoder, suggest_suggest) and the OGC `pdok-location-api_get-open` tool with concise English summaries.
reason: The spec's Dutch descriptions are 2-3 sentences long and only marginally agent-readable. Concise English summaries reduce MCP token cost per tool list call and read better in English-language tool selectors.
